word: H4972 - מַתְּלָאָה - mattᵉlâʼâh - mat-tel-aw-aw' - What a weariness

sections.paragraph:
Original: מתּלאה

Transliteration: mattelâ'âh

Phonetic: mat-tel-aw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. what a weariness, toil, hardship, weariness

Origin: from H4100 and H8513

TWOT entry: 1066a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
